Localization.Description: SharpToken was used. This tool can find leaked tokens from all processes in the system and exploit them. If attackers accessed a low-privileged account, they can use this tool to upgrade to "NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM" privileges. SharpToken can also be used to capture interactive user sessions.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} started SharpToken ({object.process.fullpath}), which is a tool for exploiting token leaks, on host {event_src.host}
